# Investigations

Time-boxed research spikes and validation experiments. Use an investigation doc
to answer a specific question before committing to a design or implementation —
e.g. proving a library can handle a requirement, reproducing a bug, or
validating a performance assumption.

Design docs, plans, and implementation docs can reference investigations by ID
(e.g. `INV-0001`) to document how open questions were resolved.
